title: AlphaForgeLabel
description: Training label row produced by AlphaForge from simulation outputs. Contains classification label, regression targets for R returns (gross and net), cost decomposition, path quality metrics, NO_TRADE quality assessment, and lineage. P0.8E: gross/net cost fields added, no_trade_quality, exit_reason, resolution_status, and lineage fields completed.

simulation_family_version.description: Version of simulation engine that produced these labels.

label_interpretation_version.description: Version of the label interpretation family.

simulation_profile_id.description: P0.8E: simulation profile reference for lineage tracking.

simulation_engine_version.description: P0.8E: simulation engine version at label generation time.

funding_status.description: P0.8E: funding model status. Currently DEFERRED.

long_R_gross.description: P0.8E: gross R for LONG_NOW before costs (from ActionOutcome.realized_r_gross).

long_R_net.description: Net R for LONG_NOW action after costs (from ActionOutcome.realized_r_net).

short_R_gross.description: P0.8E: gross R for SHORT_NOW before costs (from ActionOutcome.realized_r_gross).

short_R_net.description: Net R for SHORT_NOW action after costs (from ActionOutcome.realized_r_net).

fee_cost_r_long.description: P0.8E: fee cost in R terms for LONG_NOW.

fee_cost_r_short.description: P0.8E: fee cost in R terms for SHORT_NOW.

slippage_cost_r_long.description: P0.8E: slippage cost in R terms for LONG_NOW.

slippage_cost_r_short.description: P0.8E: slippage cost in R terms for SHORT_NOW.

total_cost_r_long.description: P0.8E: total cost (fee+slippage+spread) in R terms for LONG_NOW.

total_cost_r_short.description: P0.8E: total cost (fee+slippage+spread) in R terms for SHORT_NOW.

best_action_label.description: Classification label: the best comparative action.

best_action_after_cost.description: P0.8E: best action after applying all costs. May differ from best_action_label if costs flip the decision.

action_gap_R.description: Gap between best and second-best action in R terms.

is_ambiguous.description: P0.8E: whether the best action is ambiguous (gap below threshold).

label_validity.description: Derived from resolution_status and is_ambiguous. Controls whether this row is used for training.

resolution_status.description: P0.8E: how the simulation resolved (e.g., TARGET_HIT, STOP_HIT, TIME_EXIT, UNRESOLVED).

exit_reason.description: P0.8E: reason for trade exit (from simulation engine).

no_trade_quality.description: P0.8E: NO_TRADE quality classification — first-class label, not a fallback.

was_correct_skip.description: P0.8E: whether skipping the trade was correct (no positive edge available).

saved_loss_r.description: P0.8E: loss saved by not trading, in R terms.

missed_opportunity_r.description: P0.8E: opportunity missed by not trading, in R terms.

regret_R.description: Regret relative to best action in R terms.

long_mfe_R.description: MFE in R terms for LONG_NOW.

short_mfe_R.description: MFE in R terms for SHORT_NOW.

long_mae_R.description: MAE in R terms for LONG_NOW.

short_mae_R.description: MAE in R terms for SHORT_NOW.

path_quality_score.description: Path quality score for the best action.
